channel.title: Algorithms on Observer
channel.description: Recent content in Algorithms on Observer

item.title: Changes to String in java (from 1.7.0_06)
item.description: Before 1.7.0_06, String has 4 non static field: char[] value int[] offset int count int hash Subing.substring create a String by sharing the original String’s internal char[] value and setting offset.

item.title: Algorithms - Graphs
item.description: Undirected Graphs Some problems Path Shortest path Cycle Ehler tour: A cycle that uses each edge excatly once. Hamilton tour: A cycle that uses each vertex exactly once classical NP-complete problem.
